title: Grilled Zanzibari Fish Wrap
description: A low-sodium friendly Grilled Zanzibari Fish Wrap using fermented makrut lime leaves and rendered fat for a chewy, adventurous Portuguese dish.

ingredients.name: Low-Sodium White Fish Fillets
ingredients.notes: Fillets of white fish such as cod or haddock

ingredients.name: Pasta Sauce (Optional)
ingredients.notes: A low-sodium pasta sauce can be used for added flavor

instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
Prepare the Fermented Makrut Lime Leaves by cleaning and tearing them into bite-sized pieces.
Season each white fish fillet with salt and pepper, then place on a plate. Top each fillet with Fermented Makrut Lime Leaves.
Heat the rendered fat in a pan over medium heat. Once hot, add the seasoned fillets and cook for 4-5 minutes per side or until fully cooked (fish should flake easily).
Squeeze fresh lime juice over the cooked fish before serving it with a pasta sauce if desired.
